title: ATLAS: Denial of ML Service / Inference Flood (AML.T0029 / AML.T0046)
description: Surfaces request floods and chaff/spam aimed at LLM/ML inference endpoints, the telemetry signature of Denial of ML Service and resource exhaustion. Aggregates inference traffic by Client IP and route, ranking high-volume sources and the share of error/throttle responses they generate, using only SOC Application Logs fields. Triage threshold: investigate Client IPs with Calls far above the per-service baseline or a high Throttled/Errored share. MITRE ATLAS AML.T0029 (Denial of ML Service) and AML.T0046 (Spamming ML System with Chaff Data).
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and ('Request URL' like '*/v1/chat*' or 'Request URL' like '*/v1/completions*' or 'Request URL' like '*/v1/embeddings*' or 'Request URL' like '*/llm/*' or 'Request URL' like '*/ai/*' or 'Request URL' like '*/generate*' or 'Request URL' like '*/predict*' or 'Request URL' like '*/invoke*') | stats count as Calls, distinctcount('Trace ID') as Sessions by 'Client IP', 'Service Name' | sort -Calls
falsepositives: Legitimate burst traffic from a known high-volume integration or load test
Autoscaling health probes hitting inference routes
